arts.ttl: Lazio’s pursuit of Fazzini: Lotito hesitates amid financial considerations
arts.sum: Lazio's search for midfield reinforcements has led them to Empoli's young talent Jacopo Fazzini, but club president Claudio Lotito is proceeding with caution due to financial constraints. The 21-year-old Italian midfielder has caught the eye of several Serie A clubs, including Fiorentina, with Empoli president Fabrizio Corsi reportedly valuing the player at €14-15 million.
